original_statement: who came in first in the general standings?
mutated_statement: who came in first in the general something?
mutation_analysis: Lexical replacement + Placeholder generalization: Specific noun "standings" replaced by vague placeholder "something" (general standings → general something)

behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 从iteration 0的judge_thought可识别关键信息："The table lists cyclists by rank. Row 1 shows rank 1 as Alejandro Valverde, indicating he came in first." Agent在execution中直接进行了select/sort/simple_query并返回具体答案“Alejandro Valverde”，judge也标记为[Correct]。日志中没有任何关于问题中“general something”模糊性的反思、澄清请求或不确定性表述，也未使用ambiguous、unclear或需要更多信息等措辞。因此Agent是把变异问题当作明确的“general standings”来处理并直接给出答案，符合“无法意识到指令模糊”的定义。
